title: Review: bridges/daemon store+jmap round 23
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — message_set non-atomic ownership+write, Space/queryChanges correctness bug, and multiple unbounded result sets represent immediate correctness and scaling risks. bridge-* zombie process and echo loop scenarios require correct daemon lifecycle. Reaction/timestamp/content_type fields lack input validation.
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: did not read daemon/src/relay.rs or daemon/src/state.rs which interact with the store — cross-layer race conditions between relay event handling and JMAP writes may exist that are not visible from store.rs + jmap.rs alone. Would raise confidence if: read relay.rs dispatch paths and verify store mutations are sequenced correctly with JMAP handlers.
